Description:
Ballistics of the 53-VOF-463(M) round, with the 53-OF-462(Zh) high-explosive fragmentation shell, fired from the M-30 howitzer. The gun and ammunition was copied in the PRC as Type 54 122mm howitzer, and the WB012P HE-Frag shell.

Projectile weighs 21.76 kg, variable charge includes 4x 0.325 kg bags of 9/7 pyroxylin grains on top, 4x 0.115 kg bags of 9/7 pyroxylin grains in the bottom, with 0.34 kg of 4/1 pyroxylin grains in the center, totalling 2.1 kg. Develops 2350 kgf/cm^2 peak breech pressure (copper crusher gauge), and 515 m/s from 2384 mm of projectile travel. Chamber volume measures 3.77L and 2.86 dm tall. 

Recoil length with full charge is 960-1065 mm, extreme stop at 1100 mm.

References:
- 《国产火炮手册》兵器工业部第二管理局，1982
- 《炮弹火箭手册》兵器工业部第三管理局，1984
- 《火炮内弹道计算手册》王连荣，张佩勤，国防工业出版社，1987
